en: are, but I told them I wouldn't bring them to you unless I could put the cuffs on you
ko: 하지만 내가 너에게 수갑을 채울 수 없다면 데려가지 않겠다고 말했어.

en: myself. Oh, you have a gun? You have a gun? No gun? No. No gun. And you tell me what,
there's uh, there's two dozen French police officers out there right now on Christmas
ko: 지금 크리스마스 이브에 프랑스 경찰이 두 다스나 나와 있다는 거야?

en: Eve, is that what you're telling me? Yeah. Alright, alright. Well, there's no windows
here. I'm gonna take a look out the front door. No, no! I told him I'd walk out first
ko: 앞문 밖을 좀 볼게. 안 돼. 안 돼.

en: and give a signal. Here, you can put these on yourself. No! I can't do that. I can't
do that. You know why? Because I think you're full of s***. I don't think there's anyone
else out there. I think it's just me and you. That's right. I think it's just me and you,
and you know what? You're gonna have to catch me yourself. We don't have time for this.
That's good. That's good. Tell me what you want me to see, huh? I wouldn't lie to you.
Look, you're wearing a wedding ring. You're wearing a wedding ring, Carl! You lied to
me about that! You lied about that! You asked me if I had a family. I did. But I don't anymore.
ko: 너가 나에게 가족이 있냐고 물었지. 있었어.
